Global Variable# kIOSurfaceName

iOS 14.0+iPadOS 14.0+Mac Catalyst 14.0+macOS 11.0+tvOS 14.0+visionOS 1.0+

```
let kIOSurfaceName: CFString
```

## [See Also](/documentation/IOSurface/kIOSurfaceName#see-also)

### [Constants](/documentation/IOSurface/kIOSurfaceName#Constants)

[`let kIOSurfaceAllocSize: CFString`](/documentation/iosurface/kiosurfaceallocsize)CFNumber of the total allocation size of the buffer including all planes.[`let kIOSurfaceBytesPerElement: CFString`](/documentation/iosurface/kiosurfacebytesperelement)The total number of bytes in an element.[`let kIOSurfaceBytesPerRow: CFString`](/documentation/iosurface/kiosurfacebytesperrow)The bytes per row of the buffer.[`let kIOSurfaceCacheMode: CFString`](/documentation/iosurface/kiosurfacecachemode)The CPU cache mode to be used for the allocation.[`let kIOSurfaceColorSpace: CFString`](/documentation/iosurface/kiosurfacecolorspace)[`let kIOSurfaceElementHeight: CFString`](/documentation/iosurface/kiosurfaceelementheight)CFNumber for how many pixels high each element is.[`let kIOSurfaceElementWidth: CFString`](/documentation/iosurface/kiosurfaceelementwidth)CFNumber for how many pixels wide each element is.[`let kIOSurfaceHeight: CFString`](/documentation/iosurface/kiosurfaceheight)The height of the IOSurface buffer in pixels.[`let kIOSurfaceICCProfile: CFString`](/documentation/iosurface/kiosurfaceiccprofile)[`let kIOSurfaceIsGlobal: CFString`](/documentation/iosurface/kiosurfaceisglobal)CFBoolean If true, the IOSurface may be looked up by any task in the system by its ID.Deprecated[`let kIOSurfaceOffset: CFString`](/documentation/iosurface/kiosurfaceoffset)The starting offset into the buffer.[`let kIOSurfacePixelFormat: CFString`](/documentation/iosurface/kiosurfacepixelformat)A 32-bit unsigned integer that stores the traditional macOS buffer format.[`let kIOSurfacePixelSizeCastingAllowed: CFString`](/documentation/iosurface/kiosurfacepixelsizecastingallowed)[`let kIOSurfacePlaneBase: CFString`](/documentation/iosurface/kiosurfaceplanebase)The base offset into the buffer for this plane.[`let kIOSurfacePlaneBitsPerElement: CFString`](/documentation/iosurface/kiosurfaceplanebitsperelement)
